title: Tangy Smoky Mexican Rigatoni Pozole
description: A smoky and tangy Mexican dish featuring rigatoni in a pozole form, perfect for a solo dinner, wrapped in a pandan leaf for added flavor and presentation.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the rigatoni according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the red onion until translucent.
Add the chipotle peppers, smoked paprika, and hominy to the pan and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lime juice and a pinch of salt.
Add the cooked rigatoni to the pan and toss to coat with the smoky hominy mixture.
Brush the pandan leaves with a little water and wrap each portion of rigatoni mixture in a leaf.
Place the wrapped pozole on a baking sheet and bake for 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
